query:
SELECT
                a.pk_driver_mail_attachment_id,
                a.fk_driver_mail_id,
                d.file_name,
                d.s3_file_path,
                d.created_at
            FROM driver_mail_attachments a
            JOIN documents d ON d.pk_document_id = a.fk_document_id
            WHERE a.fk_driver_mail_id = ANY($1)
            ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
